name: Janie Hibler's Apricot-Nectarine Spoon Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine apricots and nectarines in a medium saucepan.
2. Add sugar and lemon juice to the fruit mixture.
3. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
4. Continue cooking until the jam thickens, about 30 to 35 minutes.
Makes about 3 2/3 cups.
